meta.title: Trip Planner | Find the Right Rental Car | Rent With Heldy
meta.description: Tell us about your trip — travelers, luggage, and vibe — and we'll recommend the right rental car from our South Florida fleet.

hero.title: Plan your South Florida trip
hero.subtitle: Three quick questions. We'll match you to the right vehicle in our fleet.

quiz.title: Find the right car for your trip
quiz.subtitle: Answer 3 quick questions and we'll match you to vehicles in our fleet.

compact.label: Compact / Economy
compact.description: Easy parking, great fuel economy — perfect for couples or solo trips.

midsize.label: Mid-Size Sedan
midsize.description: Comfortable cabin and trunk space for small families or business travel.

suv.label: Mid-Size SUV
suv.description: Extra cargo room and elevated ride — ideal for beach days and active trips.

fullsuv.label: Full-Size SUV / 3-Row
fullsuv.description: Maximum space for big groups, gear, and long road trips.
